title: Hemionitis purpusii
taxonomy: Hemionitis purpusii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Hemionitis. The classification of Hemionitis purpusii is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Division - Pteridophyta, Class - Polypodiopsida, Order - Polypodiales, Family - Polypodiaceae, Genus - Hemionitis, Species - H. purpusii. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but the above classification is one of the commonly accepted ones. Further research may provide more specific information on this species.
